message:
chore: add perf.data and screenshot patterns to .gitignore

Ignore profiling artifacts (perf.data, perf.data.*) and Windows
Snipping Tool screenshots (Snipping_*.png) that accumulate in the
working tree from profiling sessions and bug reports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,3 +26,10 @@ target-sagebeacon/
 
 # Fuzz testing build artifacts
 fuzz/target/
+
+# Profiling artifacts
+perf.data
+perf.data.*
+
+# Screenshots
+Snipping_*.png
